_comment: Ground-truth dataset for `python -m rag_tutor eval`. Each item has a 'query', and EITHER 'relevant_sources' (exact source/page pairs known to answer it) OR 'expected_keywords' (used as a relevance fallback when retrieved text contains them). 'subject' must match an ingested subject. Replace these generic examples with curated entries for your own PDFs for meaningful scores.
